items.title: Greedy Function Approximation: A Gradient Boosting Machine (Friedman, 2001)
items.author: Jerome H. Friedman
items.note: Original GBM paper defining pseudo-residuals, shrinkage, and the sequential tree-fitting algorithm.

items.title: scikit-learn GradientBoostingRegressor
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Accessible API reference with hyperparameters (n_estimators, learning_rate, max_depth) and staged_predict.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning — Boosting and Additive Trees
items.author: Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman
items.note: Textbook treatment connecting AdaBoost, GBM, and regularization via shrinkage and early stopping.
